company_tagline: Give your business the reach it deserves.
business_model: B2B — sell advertising products and tools to small and medium businesses to help them reach consumers on Facebook, Instagram, WhatsApp, and Messenger
product_being_marketed: Meta Ads Platform (Facebook Ads, Instagram Ads, Advantage+ Campaigns, Meta Business Suite, WhatsApp Business API)
target_customer_description: Small and medium business owners (1-500 employees) across retail, e-commerce, services, hospitality, and professional services who want to reach their target customers affordably and drive measurable business results
campaign_context: Meta's SMB marketing team runs campaigns to: (1) acquire new SMB advertisers who have never run a Meta ad, (2) re-engage lapsed advertisers who stopped spending, (3) upsell active advertisers from basic campaigns to Advantage+ automation, (4) drive WhatsApp Business API adoption among service businesses
brand_voice_summary: Meta's brand voice for SMB marketing is empowering, optimistic, and results-focused. It speaks to business owners as capable entrepreneurs who deserve world-class tools. Copy is specific (real numbers, real benchmarks), accessible (no jargon), and action-oriented. Meta leads with the business outcome first ('More customers walking through your door') before explaining the mechanism. Tone is warm but not informal, confident but not arrogant. Meta avoids overpromising — it cites median benchmarks not maximums, and always grounds claims in data.

products.name: Meta Ads
products.tagline: Reach the customers who matter to your business.
products.price_model: Pay-per-result. Start from $5/day. No setup fee, no minimum commitment.

products.name: Advantage+ Campaigns
products.tagline: Let AI find your best customers — automatically.
products.price_model: Same auction-based pricing as Meta Ads. No premium for automation.
products.target_segment: SMBs spending $1k+/mo who want to scale without adding headcount
products.key_benefit: 32% lower CPA than manual campaigns on average

products.name: Meta Business Suite
products.tagline: Run your Facebook and Instagram business from one place.
products.target_segment: SMBs managing organic + paid presence across Facebook and Instagram

products.name: WhatsApp Business API
products.tagline: Turn conversations into conversions — at scale.
products.price_model: Per-message pricing. Free within 72-hour service windows. Utility/auth messages charged per delivery.
products.target_segment: Service businesses, e-commerce, and multi-location SMBs with high customer messaging volume

key_proof_points: Median ROAS of 2.19x across SMB advertisers (Meta internal data, 2025)
Advantage+ Shopping campaigns deliver 32% lower CPA than manual campaigns
3+ billion people use Meta apps every day
200+ million businesses use Meta apps to connect with customers
Average SMB advertiser sees $2.06 returned per $1 spent
Median CTR of 2.19% across Meta placements
